justification: Top-level lexer tests cover every token category; round-trip and crash-oracle properties augment fixed examples.
proposed_properties: round-trip lex(render(token)) for each kind; crash-oracle on any well-formed token stream

justification: Composite multi-feature tests; token-stream round-trip + crash-oracle generalize beyond hand-written cases.
proposed_properties: token-stream round-trip; crash-oracle on rendered token streams

justification: Tests interactions between literals/operators/keywords; token-stream round-trip applies.
Realistic-code samples; crash-oracle on rendered streams plus ws-invariance add coverage.
proposed_properties: crash-oracle on rendered token streams; whitespace invariance

justification: Syntax-shape tests; token-stream round-trip and ws-invariance apply.
Identifier rules generalize to every valid identifier string; non-keyword guarantee is a property.
proposed_properties: identifier round-trip; identifier non-overlap with keyword/reserved

justification: Every reserved keyword should produce VF1500 — a crash-oracle property over the full set.
proposed_properties: crash-oracle: any reserved keyword input throws VF1500

justification: Number format determinism generalizes; underscore separators and scientific notation are property-friendly.
proposed_properties: integer format determinism for safe integers; scientific notation parses to numeric value

justification: Hex/binary/decimal share the determinism property; round-trip on any safe integer.
proposed_properties: decimal/hex/binary round-trip for safe integers; underscore-stripping invariance

justification: Tests are about specific location fields (line/column/offset) for hand-picked inputs; doesn't generalize to a property without re-implementing line tracking.
Maximal-munch and adjacency edge cases are properties: any sequence of operators round-trips.
Each test asserts an exact error message for a specific invalid character; the entire file is regression-style for VF1400.
Multi-char operator tokens are exactly the round-trip target (==, !=, ::, etc.).
String codepoint preservation through JSON.stringify is the canonical property; covers astral codepoints and escapes.
proposed_properties: string literal codepoint preservation via JSON.stringify; round-trip

justification: Comment-stripping invariance is a strong property: comments do not change the token stream.
proposed_properties: comment-stripping invariance for line and block comments

justification: hasLeadingWhitespace flag has a clear property: it is true iff whitespace precedes the token.
proposed_properties: hasLeadingWhitespace iff non-empty whitespace precedes token; whitespace amount invariance for kind sequence

justification: NFC normalization is idempotent and equates composed/decomposed forms — both are properties.
proposed_properties: NFC idempotence on identifier values; composed and decomposed forms produce the same identifier value

justification: Tests two boolean predicates (isKeyword, isBoolLiteral) over fixed strings; properties would just enumerate the same sets.
